'''Quich Marae''' was a male [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] [[Junk dealer/Legends|junk dealer]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he bought and sold goods at a [[Agro Outpost|pirate outpost]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].
